_comment: Manual sources (13-18) are NOT automated in this MVP. Per master prompt, these must display 'Manual Verification Required' in the report rather than faked results. This file is a template for the future Playwright-based collectors mentioned in 07_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md.

manual_sources.notes: Search by address. Verify amount due, latest payment, and annual bill history live before closing.
Pull sales table from property record card. Flag $100/unqualified transfers as non-market.
Search by instrument number from sales history to confirm deed type and parties.
Search by address and parcel variants. 'No results found' does not guarantee no violations exist.

manual_sources.url: Florida DOH Hillsborough eBridge public records
manual_sources.notes: Search by address for OSTDS permit PDFs. Historical record only; current installation/condition must be verified.

manual_sources.url: Florida DOH Hillsborough eBridge public records
manual_sources.notes: Search drinking water categories. Absence of a record does not prove no well exists.
If wetlands/lowlands detected by NWI/HCPA, recommend EPC/environmental consultant review.
